title: Kanbus clock: increase transition summary-to-FROM vertical gap to 4px

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing targeted transition layout tweak: add +2px spacer before FROM so summary->FROM gap is 4px total.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented targeted transition spacing: added pre-line spacer support and set +2px before FROM in transition notices, yielding 4px summary->FROM gap. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (19 passed).
